recommendations.title: The Current War
recommendations.overview: Electricity titans Thomas Edison and George Westinghouse compete to create a sustainable system and market it to the American people.

recommendations.title: ¿Y Cómo Es Él?
recommendations.overview: Thomas is a meek man on the verge of a nervous breakdown. Despite his situation he decides to fake a work trip to go to Vallarta to confront Jero, a taxi driver who is sleeping with his wife.

recommendations.title: Hypnotic
recommendations.overview: A young woman seeking self-improvement enlists the help of a renowned hypnotist but, after a handful of intense sessions, discovers unexpected and deadly consequences.

recommendations.title: The Witcher: Nightmare of the Wolf
recommendations.overview: Escaping from poverty to become a witcher, Vesemir slays monsters for coin and glory, but when a new menace rises, he must face the demons of his past.

recommendations.title: Beats
recommendations.overview: An agoraphobic hip-hop prodigy and a disgraced former music manager cross paths in Chicago’s South Side and help each other face demons of their pasts.

recommendations.title: Madeleine Collins

recommendations.title: Being 17

recommendations.title: Fluke

recommendations.title: The Cakemaker

recommendations.title: Temptation: Confessions of a Marriage Counselor
